name: Montrose (High Elevation)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 15
Max Temp > 86, Min Rh < 25, 1000hr Fuels < 12, Max RH < 55
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The High Elevation Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Y (Timber) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
Huntsman (52813), Lujan (54702), Needle Creek (54704), Taylor Park (52812)
